name: com.helteix.tools
description: Common tools used across Helteix's packages that can help your productivity when developing your game.

samples.description: A scene that showcase how to setup a new GameSettings class and how to swap the active one at runtime
A scene that showcase how to setup serialized components on GameObjects
A scene that showcase how to setup type mapping inside a scene.
A scene that showcase how to setup a MultiColumnList UI.
